name: Partial Annuitization Election

eligibility.description: Taxpayers with large deferred annuity contracts who wish to begin receiving a stream of income from only a portion of the contract.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a taxpayer to treat a portion of an annuity contract as a separate contract if annuitized for 10+ years or a lifetime, potentially accelerating basis recovery.
